debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace α
μ ν : ComplexMeasure α
f : α → ℂ
⊢ ∫ (x : α),
      @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ (μ + ν) x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ (μ + ν) =
    ∫ (x : α), @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ μ x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ μ +
      ∫ (x : α), @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ ν x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ ν

failed_attempts:
· rw [integral_add]
    · exact (VectorMeasure.integrable_rnDeriv hμ).smul hf
    · exact (VectorMeasure.integrable_rnDeriv hν).smul hf
  · exact hμ
  · exact hν

· apply Measure.integral_congr_ae
    filter_upwards [VectorMeasure.rnDeriv_add μ ν hμ hν] with x hx
    simp [hx, add_smul]
  · rw [← key _ hμ]; exact hfμ
  · rw [← key _ hν]; exact hfν

· exact hf.mono_measure (VectorMeasure.variation_add_le _ _)
  · exact hf.mono_measure (Measure.le_add_right le_rfl)
  · exact hf.mono_measure (Measure.le_add_left le_rfl)

rw [key _ hμν, key _ hμ, key _ hν, VectorMeasure.rnDeriv_add hμ hν]
  simp only [add_smul]
  rw [integral_add]
· sorry -- Integrability of f w.r.t ν

simp only [hx, Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
    ring
  rw [key _ hadd, key _ hμ, key _ hν]
  simp_rw [MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.rnDeriv_add μ ν m, add_mul]
  refine integral_add ?_ ?_
  · rw [← key _ hμ]; exact hfμ
  · rw [← key _ hν]; exact hfν

let ρ := μ.var + ν.var + (μ + ν).var
  have hμ : μ.var ≪ ρ := Measure.le_iff'.1 <| le_add_right <| le_add_right le_rfl
  have hν : ν.var ≪ ρ := Measure.le_iff'.1 <| le_add_right <| le_add_left le_rfl
  have hadd : (μ + ν).var ≪ ρ := Measure.le_iff'.1 <| le_add_left le_rfl
  have key (ξ : ComplexMeasure α) (hξ : ξ.var ≪ ρ) :
      ∫ x, ξ.ang x • f x ∂ξ.var = ∫ x, (ξ.rnDeriv ρ) x • f x ∂ρ := by
    rw [Measure.integral_map_rnDeriv hξ]
    · simp_rw [ang, smul_eq_mul, mul_assoc, ← VectorMeasure.rnDeriv_mul_rnDeriv hξ, mul_comm]
    · sorry -- Requires integrability/measurability of f
  rw [key μ hμ, key ν hν, key (μ + ν) hadd, ← integral_add]
  · congr 1 with x
    simp [add_mul, VectorMeasure.rnDeriv_add μ ν ρ hμ hν]
  · sorry -- Requires Integrable f μ
  · sorry -- Requires Integrable f ν

convert MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.integral_add (μ := μ) (ν := ν) (f := f) (sorry) (sorry) using 1
  all_goals simp only [MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.integral_def, ang, mul_comm]

-- The definition of integral coincides with `VectorMeasure.integral`.
  -- We use the linearity of `VectorMeasure.integral`.
  change VectorMeasure.integral (μ + ν) f = VectorMeasure.integral μ f + VectorMeasure.integral ν f
  -- Linearity requires integrability. We assume `f` is integrable with respect to `μ` and `ν`.
  exact VectorMeasure.integral_add (by sorry) (by sorry)

rw [key _ hμ, key _ hν, key _ hadd, ← integral_add]
  · apply integral_congr_ae
    filter_upwards [VectorMeasure.rnDeriv_add μ ν κ] with a ha
    simp only [ha, add_mul]
  · rw [← key _ hμ]; exact hfμ
  · rw [← key _ hν]; exact hfν

rw [← VectorMeasure.integral_def, ← VectorMeasure.integral_def, ← VectorMeasure.integral_def]
  exact VectorMeasure.integral_add hfμ hfν

filter_upwards [VectorMeasure.rnDeriv_add μ ν ρ] with x hx
    simp only [hx, add_mul, Pi.add_apply]
  · exact h_int _ hμ hfμ
  · exact h_int _ hν hfν
